name: Thalassa Vane-Tempest
summary: Strategic Senior Product Manager with over 9 years of experience driving product vision and cross-functional execution in fintech and SaaS environments. Proven track record of scaling complex digital platforms and leading high-performing teams to deliver user-centric solutions that drive significant revenue growth.

experience.title: Senior Product Manager
experience.description: Lead the core payment gateway product line, overseeing a roadmap that increased transaction throughput by 40% and reduced latency by 200ms. Manage a cross-functional team of 12 engineers, designers, and data analysts.

experience.title: Product Manager
experience.description: Spearheaded the migration of legacy enterprise tools to a cloud-native architecture, resulting in a 30% improvement in customer retention. Collaborated with stakeholders to define product requirements and prioritize the backlog.

experience.title: Associate Product Manager
experience.description: Supported the launch of a B2B data visualization dashboard, conducting extensive user research and A/B testing to optimize the onboarding flow and feature adoption rates.
